rationale: The citing paper explicitly says it "extends prior eWOM-driver research" and studies antecedents of eWOM volume, while the cited JMR paper is a core antecedent study on what drives online sharing/virality (emotion/arousal mechanisms). Given this clear topical/theoretical linkage and exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.10.0353), this is not safely an incidental mention.
